basic_details.job_title: Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Junior Clerk, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk, Junior Typist, Copyist, Stenographer Gr-III, Salaried Amin
basic_details.short_information: Kalahandi District Court Notification 2026 has been released on the official website kalahandi.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 17 vacancies for Junior Clerk, Junior Typist, Copyist, Stenographer Gr-III, and Salaried Amin have been announced through the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for reserved categories as per relevant Act, Rules, orders or instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent, Diploma in Computer Application, Matriculation or equivalent, Revenue Inspector Training, Passed Odia at M.E. Standard
qualification.details: Junior Clerk, Junior Typist, Copyist: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized Institute. Stenographer Gr-III: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized Institute. Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent examination of a recognized Board, Revenue Inspector Training and basic knowledge in computer application.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-4 to Level-7 of the Pay Matrix of the ORSP Rules, 2017
salary_details.details: Junior Clerk, Junior Typist, Copyist: Rs.19,900-63,200/- (Level-4 of the Pay Matrix of the ORSP Rules, 2017) Stenographer Gr-III: Rs.25,500-81,100/- (Level-7 of the Pay Matrix of the ORSP Rules, 2017) Salaried Amin: Rs.21,700-69,100/- (Level-5 of the Pay Matrix of the ORSP Rules, 2017)

selection_process: Written Test Practical Skill Test Viva-voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Kalahandi District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://Kalahandi.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Kalahandi District Court Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Kalahandi District Court Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Kalahandi District Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Clerk, Junior Typist, Copyist: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized Institute. Stenographer Gr-III: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized Institute. Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent examination of a recognized Board, Revenue Inspector Training and basic knowledge in computer application.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for reserved categories as per relevant Act, Rules, orders or instructions.

content_sections.heading: Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Practical Skill Test Viva-voce Test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Kalahandi District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://Kalahandi.dcourts.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026 is 13-08-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 17 vacancies are available for the posts of Junior Clerk, Junior Typist, Copyist, Stenographer Gr-III, and Salaried Amin in the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Clerk post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Clerk post, candidates must have completed a +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university and possess a Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized Institute.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026 includes a Written Test, a Practical Skill Test, and a Viva-voce Test.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Stenographer Gr-III post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Stenographer Gr-III post is Rs.25,500-81,100/- which falls under Level-7 of the Pay Matrix of the ORSP Rules, 2017.

faq.question: Q8. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Kalahandi District Court, which is https://Kalahandi.dcourts.gov.in. Direct links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the application form will be mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the notification for the exact mailing address.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Kalahandi District Court Recruitment 2026 is 13-08-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
